title: Explosive Enhancement 1.12.2
description: Makes the explosion animation look cooler.
body:
[![Available on CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3.3.1/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/explosive-enhancement-legacy)
[![Available on Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement-1.12.2)

# Explosive Enhancement 1.12.2

### Enhancing explosions since 2023.

Explosive Enhancement is a small mod which makes the Minecraft explosion animation look nicer. It adds new particles, has a small config, and allows you to enable/disable the default explosion effect.

**Please note:** This mod requires [Cleanroom](https://cleanroommc.com/).

Original mod: [https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement)
